violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Metal shavings present at can opener blade, gears and bracket.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Drain board at shake pitchers has residue present below inverted pitchers. -Splatter/residue at screen near blenders. -Minimal debris at underside of door handles. -Staining at caulking around ice bin at shake station.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sani Sink solution is cloudy and has food debris, due for refresh.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Back hand sink out of paper towels. *COS-Stocked upon request.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee coat and jacket stored on top of ice machine. *COS-moved to dry storage area, away from food service items.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
